component.name: Job Card
component.description: Primary list/detail surface for a single job: left accent rail, title + customer/date row, optional category chip, **Status pill** (`622:143`) in the header, and a four-column metrics footer (TIME, REV, MAT, NET). Auto layout end-to-end. Copy and metrics are instance/code-driven.

dimensions.height: auto by variant: ~227.5px Default (`661:2`), ~189px No job category (`622:162`), ~167px Empty State (`622:199`), shorter **No Metrics** (`1286:816`) — header + category only, no metrics row

figmaVariants.Property 1=Default: Node `661:2`. Category chip visible; example job + category + metrics.
figmaVariants.Property 1=No job category: Node `622:162`. Same as Default but **no** category chip (row removed; shorter height).
figmaVariants.Property 1=Empty State: Node `622:199`. No category chip; placeholder **Untitled Job**, **No customer**, **Last updated Mar 13**. Status is a **`Status pill`** component instance (**Not started** / `622:144`), not inline text. Metrics **0.0h** / **$0** / **-$0** / **$0**.
figmaVariants.Property 1=No Metrics: Node `1286:816`. Same as Default for title, metadata, status pill, and **category chip**; **no** TIME/REV/MAT/NET row or divider.

layoutSemantics.base: Figma **component set** `622:161` with property **Property 1** (`Default` | `No job category` | `Empty State` | `No Metrics`). Code: `variant` **`withCategory`** | **`noCategory`** | **`emptyState`** | **`noMetrics`**.
layoutSemantics.categoryVariant: `withCategory` and `noMetrics`: show category chip when `categoryLabel` is set. `noCategory` and `emptyState`: omit chip. `emptyState` applies default copy when props are omitted (see `codeProps`).
layoutSemantics.statusPill: Header uses the **`Status pill`** component (`622:143`) via `StatusPill` in code. Map `statusVariant` to pill kind (`success` → paid, `neutral` → not started) or pass `statusPillKind` for full lifecycle control.

regions.card: Outer frame: **Foundation/Surface/White** fill; **1px** stroke **Foundation/Border/Subtle** at **~10%** paint opacity (matches variable binding in file); corner **Radius/16**. Drop shadow **0 / 1 / 2 / 5%** black (local effect; same family as other cards).
regions.accentRail: 2px-wide vertical strip; **Brand/Primary** at **15%** paint opacity (matches reference frame `622:90`; `#D4572A`).
regions.header: Title: Typography/Title-H3. Metadata: Typography/Body. Status: **Status pill** (`Typography/LABEL`) — see `Status pill` spec and `tokens.colors`.
regions.category: Chip fill **Foundation/Text/Primary**; label **Typography/LABEL** + **Foundation/Background/Default** (warm off-white), not pure white—matches reference `622:90`.
regions.metrics: Typography/**Body-Bold** (14 SemiBold) for values. Labels: Typography/LABEL + **Foundation/Text/Muted**. Colors: **Foundation/Text/Primary** (TIME/REV), **Brand/Accent** (MAT value — matches Figma binding), **Semantic/Status/Success/Text** or **Brand/Primary** (NET) per `netSentiment`.
regions.autoLayout: Root horizontal (accent + content stack); header row horizontal; status pill and category chip horizontal hug; metrics row horizontal with equal-grow columns; each metric column vertical; accent strip vertical fill on the cross axis.
regions.spacing: Root padding **Spacing/24** horizontal, **0** vertical. Inner **Container**: **Spacing/24** top + bottom, **Spacing/16** between header / category / metrics. Nested spacing uses **Spacing** tokens—see `spacingLayout`.

spacingLayout.contentPaddingVertical: Spacing/24 on inner **Container** (top + bottom); horizontal padding 0 on that frame (root supplies horizontal inset)
spacingLayout.sectionStackGap: Spacing/16 between header / category / metrics on inner **Container**
spacingLayout.titleHeadingGap: 0 on **Heading** frame (Spacing token; multi-line title still uses Title-H3 line wrapping)

tokens.collections: Figma variables are grouped as in the file: **Color Styles** (palette), **Spacing**, **Radius**, **Typography** (family/size/weight as string or float vars backing text styles). Prefer binding to those variables—not raw hex—in production components.

codeProps.variant: `withCategory` | `noCategory` | `emptyState` | `noMetrics` — align with Figma **Property 1** (Default / No job category / Empty State / No Metrics).
codeProps.title: Required when `variant` is not `emptyState`. For `emptyState`, defaults to **Untitled Job**.
codeProps.lastWorkedLabel: optional; for `emptyState` defaults to **Last updated Mar 13**.
codeProps.categoryLabel: optional; chip when `variant` is `withCategory` or `noMetrics` and label is non-empty.
codeProps.status: Required when `variant` is not `emptyState`. For `emptyState`, defaults to **NOT STARTED**.
codeProps.statusVariant: `success` | `neutral` — maps to `StatusPill` kind when `statusPillKind` omitted. `emptyState` defaults to **neutral**.
codeProps.timeHours: For `emptyState` defaults to **0.0h**. Ignored visually when `variant` is `noMetrics`.
codeProps.onPress: optional callback when the card is pressed

notes: 2026-03-28: Figma **component set** `622:161` with three variants; master Default remains `661:2`.
2026-04-07: Figma **No Metrics** variant (`1286:816`): code `noMetrics` — category + header like Default, metrics row omitted.
MAT value color synced from Figma: **Brand/Accent** (`#C44B2B`); Empty State status uses **`Status pill`** instance (Not started).
Root **Spacing/24** horizontal; inner **Container** **Spacing/24** vertical + **Spacing/16** section gaps.
Spacing tokens on nested frames: **Heading** gap **0**, **Meta row** pad **0**; metrics row **Spacing/16** top inset, **Spacing/32** column gap.
Header status uses **`Status pill`** (`622:143`) + semantic tokens in `colors.json`. Accent stripe: **Brand/Primary** @ **15%** paint opacity.
Bind fills and strokes to variables via the file’s Color Styles collection; avoid raw hex on production components.
Paused/on-hold styling for **Status pill** uses **Semantic/Status/Paused/BG** + **Semantic/Status/Paused/Text** in `colors.json`.
